sentences.translation: Hodanje je jednostavan sport i korisno je za srce.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a simple sport and is beneficial for the heart.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Hodam trideset minuta svako jutro u javnom parku.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for thirty minutes every morning in the public park.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنِي هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ عَلَى فُقْدَانِ الْوَزْنِ وَالشُّعُورِ بِالنَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da izgubim kilograme i da se osjećam aktivno.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me lose weight and feel energetic.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ ارْتِدَاءُ حِذَاءٍ مُرِيحٍ أَثْنَاءَ الْمَشْيِ.
sentences.translation: Najbolje je nositi udobnu obuću tokom hodanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is best to wear comfortable shoes during walking.
